SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.config.store

Class ConfigStoreSyncManager

java.lang.Object
com.mimecast.robin.config.store.ConfigStoreSyncManager
public final class ConfigStoreSyncManager extends Object
Synchronizes Robin's local configuration directory from a PostgreSQL-backed JSON store.

Scope and safety rules:

  • Only files ending in .json5 are considered.
  • config.json5 is excluded to avoid bootstrapping loops.
  • Filenames are validated to prevent path traversal; subdirectories are not supported.
  • Critical files are protected from being overwritten by empty payloads.

Database schema (created automatically if missing):

  • server_id (part of PK)
  • file_name (part of PK)
  • payload_json (JSONB)
  • updated_epoch (seconds since epoch)
  • sha256 (hex string of canonical JSON payload)

Bootstrap behavior:

  • If the table is empty, the store is seeded from local *.json5 files.
  • Once non-empty, the database is treated as authoritative and overwrites local files. Local files not present in the database are never deleted.

  • Method Details

    • setConfigDir

      public static void setConfigDir(String dir)
      Sets the configuration directory used when resolving config.json5 and writing synced files.
      Parameters:
      dir - Configuration directory.

    • getStatus

      public static ConfigStoreSyncStatus getStatus()
      Returns the last known synchronization status.
      Returns:
      Sync status.

    • syncIfEnabled

      public static void syncIfEnabled()
      Runs a single synchronization pass if the feature is enabled in config.json5.

      Failures are recorded in getStatus() and the caller can decide whether to fail-open.
